no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The requested parent bead ddx-a9d130d0 is already decomposed into child beads and cannot be advanced safely as a single implementation slice in this worktree. The open child ddx-e1a576a7 is itself decomposed into narrower follow-ups:
- ddx-68706ef9: runner-backed pre-dispatch lint hook implementation
- ddx-4375292b: runner-backed post-attempt triage hook implementation
- ddx-c8dc1146: hook contracts + OutcomeReason carrier
- ddx-d1dae2dd: pre-claim lint loop policy and warn/block behavior
- ddx-9c81b20f: cli try runtime wiring for both hooks

Follow-up needs: pick one child bead and execute that narrower scope, or close the epic only after the child chain is completed and verified.
